seoTitle: How to Integrate Typeform With Shopify
metaDescription: Learn how to connect Typeform to your Shopify store to collect leads, feedback, and custom order requests directly on your site.
intro: Collecting leads, feedback, or custom order requests directly on a Shopify store can improve customer engagement without adding extra steps for shoppers. This guide covers how to connect Typeform with Shopify, embed forms into your store, and automate customer data collection.

steps.heading: Open Typeform and Shopify
steps.body: Have your Typeform ready and access your Shopify store's admin so you can add the form to your site.

steps.heading: Connect your Shopify store
steps.body: Set up the connection between Typeform and your Shopify store using the embed code or available integration.

steps.heading: Embed and configure the form
steps.body: Add the form to relevant Shopify pages, such as product pages or your storefront, and configure its display style.

faq.question: What can I use Typeform for on a Shopify store?
faq.answer: It's commonly used for lead generation, customer surveys, product recommendations, order forms, and marketing automation.

faq.question: Can I embed Typeform on specific Shopify product pages?
faq.answer: Yes, the embed code can be placed on specific product pages, landing pages, or other parts of your storefront.

faq.question: Will this help with customer feedback collection?
faq.answer: Yes, Typeform can be used to collect post-purchase feedback or general customer satisfaction surveys within your Shopify store.

faq.question: Does this integration require ongoing maintenance?
faq.answer: Once set up, the embed generally continues working, though you may need to update it if you significantly change your Typeform or Shopify theme.
